form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at this track. Looks up against it this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at this track. Looks up against it this time.

form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fifth in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 8 over 435m at Sale behind Otto Rose, beaten 6 lengths (24.90). Looks tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fifth in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 8 over 435m at Sale behind Otto Rose, beaten 6 lengths (24.90). Looks tested in this company.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fifth (26.53) at this track in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win. Will jump from box 4 for the first time. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when fifth (26.53) at this track in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win. Will jump from box 4 for the first time. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (26.11) at big odds over 460m at this track. Boxed awkwardly but is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (26.11) at big odds over 460m at this track. Boxed awkwardly but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at Shepparton over 390m (22.56) beating We Got Lucky in T3 Grade 7 on April 10. In form and expected to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at Shepparton over 390m (22.56) beating We Got Lucky in T3 Grade 7 on April 10. In form and expected to run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted on first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 460m at Geelong beaten 5.5 lengths (26.24) behind Inspection in a Restricted WIN H on April 10. Has run slick time here with a 25.87 PB at the distance. Go close.
